name: writing-polish
description: Coaches, drafts, polishes, and audits Chinese documents based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然). v7.0 两世界拆分: per-use 改稿走 clean-context writing-reviewer 子代理返回自然语言反馈 + 粗判 (够好了/要改/红线未清), 数值逐维评分下沉 evals/offline-harness/ 离线 dev-eval. 审查四焦点: 立意 / 结构与论据 / 材料·事实 / AI味·标点. Modes: coach / polish / audit.
